hints.dashboard: Operational snapshot — active jobs, queued work, and queue health.
hints.acquire: Enqueue URLs (single line or batch) into the download queue.
hints.queue: Inspect, open, or cancel jobs that are running or queued.
hints.history: Browse completed jobs and failures or retry past URLs.
hints.library: Finished downloads — preview and reuse completed items.
hints.presets: Save and edit JSON presets (formats, subtitles, cookie paths).
hints.schedules: Cron-based recurring downloads via job templates.
hints.cookies: Manage cookie files referenced from preset JSON.
hints.diagnostics: Health checks, runtime downloads path, SignalR heartbeat.

screenReader.dashboard: Dashboard — operational overview of jobs and queue health.
screenReader.acquire: Acquire — add URLs to the download queue.
screenReader.queue: Queue — jobs that are downloading or waiting.
screenReader.cookies: Cookies — profiles for yt-dlp / preset cookie files.
screenReader.diagnostics: Diagnostics — system health and sidecar telemetry.
screenReader.settings: Settings — language choice and downloads path.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Operational snapshot for your acquisition engine.

history.title: History
history.subtitle: Completed, failed, and cancelled jobs.
history.retryTooltip: Retry — new job from this URL
history.retryConfirm: Create a new job from this one?

jobDetail.title: Job
jobDetail.retryConfirm: Create a new job from this one?
jobDetail.desktopHint: Open folder / quick preview: use the MediaDock desktop app. In the browser, use paths in the Artifacts table.
jobDetail.notFound: Job not found or API unreachable.

library.title: Library
library.subtitle: Finished downloads — inline preview streams from your sidecar (/api/library/…/preview).
library.emptyHint: Enqueue a URL from Acquire, then return here.
library.removeConfirm: Remove this download from Library? Listed files under your downloads folder will be deleted, and history for this job is removed.
library.remove404: That download is missing or cannot be removed from Library (completed jobs only).

acquire.title: Acquire
acquire.subtitle: One URL or many (one URL per line). Use Schedules for recurring downloads.
acquire.destHint: Videos go directly into the downloads root folder. Change the folder in Settings.
acquire.enqueueBatchTooltip: Add multiple URLs to the queue
acquire.apiUnreachable: Could not read settings from API (is the sidecar running?).

presets.title: Presets
presets.subtitle: JSON spec: format (yt-dlp -f), subs, thumb, optional cookiesPath (absolute file).
presets.emptyTable: No presets yet. Click “New preset” to create one.
presets.defaultStarHint: Default preset — used when a job has no preset selected

schedules.title: Schedules
schedules.subtitle: Cron (standard 5 fields, e.g. {{example}} hourly). Template JSON example: {{template}}

cookies.title: Cookie files
cookies.subtitle: Absolute path to Netscape cookie files used in preset JSON: {{key}}.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Some options are still configured via the API (appsettings / environment variables).
settings.dbOverridePlaceholder: Leave blank = clear override, use default / config
settings.saveOverrideTooltip: Save path override to the database
settings.hintOrder: Order: {{configKey}} (config) → database override → default %LocalAppData%\MediaDock\downloads. Changing config requires an API restart.
settings.apiUnreachable: Could not reach the API to read the save path.

diagnostics.title: Diagnostics
diagnostics.subtitle: Health checks, downloads root, last SignalR progress.
